fields.name: Silverwoods
fields.tagline: Silverwoods is more than just a home, it's a lifestyle statement. Come, discover your dream villa and embark on a journey of serene luxury.
fields.description: Escape the urban hustle and embrace a life of serene luxury at Silverwoods, an exclusive residential villa project meticulously designed for those who seek comfort, privacy, and sophisticated living. Nestled amidst lush greenery on a generous 8.1 Acre expanse, Silverwoods offers an unparalleled lifestyle just a short drive from the city's Southern Bypass.
fields.director_bio: Delta Realtech is a renowned real estate development company committed to delivering signature landmarks that blend luxury, comfort, and sustainability. With a vision to create exceptional living spaces, Delta Realtech brings decades of expertise in crafting homes that stand as a testament to quality and innovation.

fields.name: Villa Type 1
fields.description: Independent 4 BHK (G+2) villa with maximum space, light, and ventilation. Includes private backyard garden and plunge pool.

fields.name: Villa Type 2
fields.description: Spacious 4 BHK (G+2) villa with premium interiors, private garden, plunge pool, and panoramic green views.

fields.name: Villa Type 3
fields.description: Expansive 4 BHK (G+2) villa with designer finishes, double-height living, private garden, and plunge pool.

fields.name: Villa Type 4
fields.description: Grand 4 BHK (G+2) villa with luxury interiors, spacious terrace, private backyard garden, and plunge pool.

fields.name: Villa Type 5
fields.description: Premium 4 BHK (G+2) villa with home automation, private garden, plunge pool, and exclusive amenities.

fields.name: Villa Type 6
fields.description: Ultra-luxury 4 BHK (G+2) villa — the largest layout with maximum privacy, garden, plunge pool, and bespoke finishes.

fields.name: Infinity Pool
fields.description: Stunning infinity pool with dedicated lounge area — where every day is a staycation

fields.name: 50,000 sq.ft Clubhouse
fields.description: Massive clubhouse — the ultimate social hub for the privileged few, with banquet halls and bar area

fields.name: Gym, Yoga & Zumba
fields.description: Fully equipped gym, yoga rooms, Zumba rooms, and a dedicated health arena

fields.name: Sports Arena
fields.description: Badminton, football, volleyball, billiards, and table tennis — recreation for all ages

fields.name: Kids Play & Pet Zones
fields.description: Great outdoors designed for little explorers — dedicated kids play and pet-friendly zones

fields.name: Gated Security
fields.description: High-tech gated community with 24/7 surveillance ensuring a safe, worry-free environment

fields.name: Guest Rooms & Banquet
fields.description: Social spaces with guest rooms, banquet halls for gatherings and celebrations

fields.name: Private Garden & Pool
fields.description: Every villa includes a private backyard garden and a personal plunge pool

fields.name: Traffic-Free Podium
fields.description: Grand traffic-free podium for safe walking, cycling, and community activities

fields.name: Anita Sharma
fields.comment: Silverwoods has truly redefined villa living. The quality of construction and the serene environment make it a perfect home.

fields.name: Vikram Patel
fields.comment: Exceptional project by Delta Realtech. The villa layout is brilliant and amenities are world-class. Best investment decision!

fields.name: Priya Mukherjee
fields.comment: Beautiful villas with great ventilation and natural light. The landscaped gardens are a huge plus for our family.

fields.question: What is the price of a villa?
fields.answer: Silverwoods offers 6 exclusive villa types, all priced at ₹4,800/sq.ft on buildup area. Please select a villa type to see detailed pricing and specs:

fields.question: What types of villas are available?
fields.answer: Silverwoods offers 6 exclusive villa types, all 3.5 to 4 BHK independent villas: • Villa Type 1 — 4 BHK | Buildup 2,400 sq.ft | Terrace 637 sq.ft | ₹1.15 Cr • Villa Type 2 — 4 BHK | Buildup 2,557 sq.ft | Terrace 612 sq.ft | ₹1.22 Cr • Villa Type 3 — 3.5 BHK | Buildup 2,181 sq.ft | Terrace 541 sq.ft | ₹1.04 Cr • Villa Type 4 — 3.5 BHK | Buildup 2,286 sq.ft | Terrace 574 sq.ft | ₹1.09 Cr • Villa Type 5 — 4 BHK | Buildup 3,175 sq.ft | Terrace 869 sq.ft | ₹1.52 Cr • Villa Type 6 — 4 BHK | Buildup 3,069 sq.ft | Terrace 787 sq.ft | ₹1.47 Cr All villas include a private backyard garden and personal plunge pool.

fields.question: What is the price per sq.ft?
fields.answer: The price at Silverwoods is ₹4,800 per sq.ft calculated on the buildup area. This is uniform across all villa types. Villa prices range from approximately ₹1.04 Crore (Type 3) to ₹1.52 Crore (Type 5). Contact us for the most up-to-date pricing.

fields.question: What is the built-up area of the villas?
fields.answer: Built-up areas at Silverwoods vary by villa type: • Type 1: 2,400 sq.ft buildup + 637 sq.ft terrace (total 3,689 sq.ft) • Type 2: 2,557 sq.ft buildup + 612 sq.ft terrace (total 4,058 sq.ft) • Type 3: 2,181 sq.ft buildup + 541 sq.ft terrace (total 3,394 sq.ft) • Type 4: 2,286 sq.ft buildup + 574 sq.ft terrace (total 3,551 sq.ft) • Type 5: 3,175 sq.ft buildup + 869 sq.ft terrace (total 4,893 sq.ft) • Type 6: 3,069 sq.ft buildup + 787 sq.ft terrace (total 4,722 sq.ft)

fields.question: How many plots are available?
fields.answer: Currently {{AVAILABLE_PLOTS}} plots are available at Silverwoods. Availability updates in real time — act fast as these are going quickly! Call us at +91 7411781881 or use the contact form to check the latest status.

fields.question: How many total villas are in the project?
fields.answer: Silverwoods is an exclusive community of 121 premium villas spread across 8.1 Acres. Of these, 119 are saleable plots. The project spans 6 unique villa types, each a fully independent 3.5 to 4 BHK home.

fields.question: Where is Silverwoods located?
fields.answer: Silverwoods is located at Dr. B.C. Roy Road, Dingelpota, West Bengal — 700151. Key distances: • Southern Bypass — 2.9 km • Kamalgazi More — 6 km • Shahid Khudiram Metro — 7.4 km • Kavi Nazrul Metro — 8.1 km • Sonarpur Station — 9 km • Ruby Hospital — 14 km • Woodsquare Mall — 5.1 km • BDMI School — 6.5 km Contact us to schedule a free site visit!

fields.question: How far is Silverwoods from Southern Bypass?
fields.answer: Silverwoods is just 2.9 km from the Southern Bypass, making it very well-connected to Kolkata city while offering a peaceful, green environment. Other nearby landmarks: • Kamalgazi More — 6 km • Kavi Nazrul Metro — 8.1 km • Woodsquare Mall — 5.1 km • Ruby Hospital — 14 km

fields.question: What is the nearest metro station?
fields.answer: The nearest metro stations to Silverwoods are: • Shahid Khudiram Metro — 7.4 km • Kavi Nazrul Metro — 8.1 km Both are on the Kolkata Metro network, offering excellent connectivity to the rest of the city.

fields.question: What is the RERA number?
fields.answer: Silverwoods is a fully RERA-registered project. RERA Number: WBRERA/P/SOU/2026/004427 You can verify this on the official West Bengal RERA website. This ensures full legal compliance and buyer protection.

fields.question: What is the possession date?
fields.answer: The expected possession date for Silverwoods is October 2029. Construction is progressing well. You can track villa-wise completion progress on our Site Plan page. Contact our team at +91 7411781881 for plot-specific possession timelines.

fields.question: What is the total project area?
fields.answer: Silverwoods is spread across a generous 8.1 Acres of lush land, featuring 121 premium villas, a 50,000 sq.ft clubhouse, landscaped gardens, sports arenas, an infinity pool, and wide internal roads — all in a gated, traffic-free community.

fields.question: Who is the developer of Silverwoods?
fields.answer: Delta Realtech is the developer and promoter of Silverwoods. Delta Realtech is a renowned real estate development company committed to delivering signature landmarks that blend comfort, sustainability, and aspirational living. Silverwoods is their flagship premium villa township project.

fields.question: How many floors does each villa have?
fields.answer: Each villa at Silverwoods is a 3-floor independent home (Ground + 2 upper floors). Villas are completely independent with no shared walls — offering absolute privacy, your own garden, private terrace, and personal plunge pool.

fields.question: What amenities are included?
fields.answer: Silverwoods offers world-class amenities: 🏊 Infinity Pool with lounge area 🏛️ 50,000 sq.ft Clubhouse with banquet hall & bar 💪 Gym, Yoga & Zumba Studio 🏸 Sports Arena — badminton, football, volleyball, billiards, table tennis 👶 Kids Play Zone & Pet Zone 🏡 Private Garden & Plunge Pool in every villa 🛎️ Guest Rooms in clubhouse 🔒 24/7 Gated Security with surveillance 🚶 Traffic-Free Podium for walking & cycling

fields.question: Does every villa have a private pool?
fields.answer: Yes! Every villa at Silverwoods comes with a private plunge pool and a private backyard garden — your own personal sanctuary right at home. In addition, there is a community infinity pool with a dedicated lounge area for social gatherings.

fields.question: What is the clubhouse like?
fields.answer: The Silverwoods Clubhouse is a 50,000 sq.ft mega clubhouse — one of the largest in the region. It includes: • Banquet halls for events & celebrations • Bar area • Guest rooms • Gym, Yoga & Zumba rooms • Games room (billiards, table tennis) • Community spaces It's the ultimate social hub designed for an elite lifestyle.

fields.question: Are there sports facilities?
fields.answer: Yes, Silverwoods has a full Sports Arena with: 🏸 Badminton courts ⚽ Football ground 🏐 Volleyball court 🎱 Billiards room 🏓 Table tennis 💪 Fully equipped gym 🧘 Yoga & Zumba rooms There's something for every age and interest!

fields.question: Is Silverwoods a gated community?
fields.answer: Yes! Silverwoods is a fully gated community with: • 24/7 CCTV surveillance • Controlled entry/exit points • Trained security personnel • A traffic-free podium — no vehicles inside the living zones Your family's safety and privacy are our top priority.

fields.question: Is there a kids play area?
fields.answer: Absolutely! Silverwoods has a dedicated Kids Play Zone designed for little ones, with safe, age-appropriate equipment and open spaces. There's also a Pet Zone — Silverwoods is a pet-friendly community where your furry friends are welcome!

fields.question: How can I book a site visit?
fields.answer: Booking a site visit is easy! 📞 Call us: +91 7411781881 📧 Email: info@silverwoods.co.in 🌐 Website: www.silverwoods.co.in Or simply fill out the Contact form on this page and our team will reach out within 24 hours to schedule a visit at your convenience. Site visits are free of charge.

fields.question: Is home loan available?
fields.answer: Yes! Silverwoods is approved by leading banks and NBFCs for home loans. Our team has tie-ups with major banks and can assist you through the entire loan process — from documentation to disbursement. EMI options are available. Contact us at +91 7411781881 and we'll connect you with our financial advisors.

fields.question: What is the contact number?
fields.answer: 📞 +91 7411781881 📧 info@silverwoods.co.in 🌐 www.silverwoods.co.in 📍 Dr. B.C. Roy Road, Dingelpota, West Bengal — 700151 Our team is available Monday–Saturday, 10 AM to 7 PM. You can also fill the contact form on this page!

fields.question: What is the booking process?
fields.answer: The booking process at Silverwoods is simple: 1️⃣ Site Visit — Visit the project and choose your villa 2️⃣ Villa Selection — Pick your preferred type and plot number 3️⃣ Booking Amount — Pay the initial booking amount to confirm the villa 4️⃣ Agreement — Sign the sale agreement 5️⃣ Construction Payments — Pay in linked installments as construction progresses 6️⃣ Possession — Receive your villa by October 2029 Call +91 7411781881 to begin!

fields.question: Can I customize my villa?
fields.answer: Yes! Silverwoods offers customization options for interior finishes, flooring, kitchen layout, and more depending on the construction stage of your chosen villa. Early buyers get more flexibility for customization. Contact our sales team at +91 7411781881 to discuss specific customization possibilities for your selected plot.

fields.question: What documents are required to book?
